V-M-078.scope: Premium frontend QA and release candidate gates for user/admin/public/email surfaces.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Screenshot matrix covers public/auth/user/admin/email-preview routes across mobile/tablet/desktop.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Lighthouse/Web Vitals and bundle budgets are explicit and pass or fail truthfully.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Any major viewport has overlap, horizontal scroll, unreadable text, blank canvas, or broken reduced-motion.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Release candidate is tagged before QA evidence is recorded.
